ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the jurisdiction */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the jurisdiction's health department */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the jurisdiction in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the jurisdiction */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the jurisdiction */,
  "health_official" TEXT /* Name of the primary health official */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the jurisdiction's health department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mmwr_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MMWR year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The MMWR year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mmwr_weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MMWR week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* The MMWR week number */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the MMWR year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekly report */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the MMWR week */,
  "week_ending_date" TEXT /* The date the week ends */,
  "all_cause" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths due to all causes */,
  "natural_cause" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths due to natural causes */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., 'Draft', 'Final') */,
  "report_generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths (for redundancy and ease of use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_reports_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_reports_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES mmwr_weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the disease */,
  "is_infectious" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the disease is infectious */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* The mode of transmission for infectious diseases */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* The prevalence rate of the disease in the jurisdiction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_disease_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease count */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weekly report */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_disease_counts_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_disease_counts_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weekly_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "flag_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the flag (e.g., 'Low', 'Medium', 'High') */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of flag (e.g., 'Mortality', 'Outbreak') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flag */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weekly report */,
  "flag_value" TEXT /* Value of the flag (e.g., 'None', 'Alert') */,
  "flag_raised_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who raised the flag */,
  "flag_raised_date" TEXT /* Date the flag was raised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id", "report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'researcher', 'analyst', 'admin') */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's contact phone number */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., 'view', 'download') */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weekly_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality issue */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weekly report */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality issue */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "issue_raised_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who raised the data quality issue */,
  "issue_raised_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was raised */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the resolution of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weekly_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction where the intervention took place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the intervention */,
  "target_population" INTEGER /* Target population for the intervention */,
  "intervention_status" TEXT /* Status of the intervention (e.g., 'Planned', 'Ongoing', 'Completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention impact */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weekly report */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the intervention */,
  "impact_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the impact (e.g., 'Low', 'Medium', 'High') */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g., 'Positive', 'Negative') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weekly_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., 'Planned', 'Ongoing', 'Completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of study data */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weekly report */,
  "data_usage" TEXT /* Description of how the data was used in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_data_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weekly_reports ("report_id")
)
